essence: Supervises groundworks teams, ensuring safe excavation, drainage, and foundation preparation.

identity.title: Groundworks Supervisor
identity.summary: Leads operatives on earthworks, drainage, and foundation tasks, coordinating plant, materials, and safety on site.

salary.notes: Supervisors on large civil projects can earn higher pay and allowances.

qualifications: Experience in groundworks, civils, or construction supervision
Knowledge of plant operations and excavation safety

lifestyle.description: Site leadership role with responsibility for teams, plant, and safety; frequent early starts and coordination with contractors.

habits: Plans daily tasks and allocates resources
Ensures compliance with safety and quality
